etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "tree") + 氐(氐) (dǐ, "base") = tree base -> roots
etymology.interpretation: The character 柢(dǐ, "roots") combines 木(木) (mù, "tree"), indicating something related to trees, with 氐(氐) (dǐ, "base"), which provides the phonetic component. Together, they form the idea of the base or foundation of a tree, which are its roots.
